idea-plugin.name: Offxy
idea-plugin.description: Native Word .docx editor for JetBrains IDEs — no webview, no Microsoft Office. The document engine is the dependency-free docxy Rust core (parse → render → edit → lossless save), compiled to WebAssembly and executed on the JVM. Open documents advertise on the docxy agent-control protocol, so AI assistants (Claude Code, Junie) can read and edit them live.
